items.title: Metacognition in LLMs: Foundations, Progress, and Opportunities
items.summary_en: This paper addresses the lack of clarity on how and to what degree large language models (LLMs) can possess metac
items.summary_zh: 本文聚焦大语言模型是否及如何具备元认知能力这一核心问题，首次全面梳理了该领域的基础概念与研究全貌。通过系统分类现有方法、基准测试和激发元认知的技术，它揭示了当前进展与瓶颈，阐明了元认知对提升AI可靠性、透明度和智能水平的关键作用。
items.title_en: Metacognition in LLMs: Foundations, Progress, and Opportunities

items.title: Invariant Learning Dynamics of Transformers in Inductive Reasoning Tasks
items.summary_en: This paper addresses the challenge of understanding how Transformer models acquire inductive reasoning skills across varied tasks by proposing a unified theoretical framework for a generalized class of inductive problems. The key finding is that the training dynamics of attention models collapse onto a low-dimensional invariant manifold with interpretable coordinates, allowing the analysis of competition between in-context and in-weights learning and the influence of initialization on circuit formation. This matters because it offers a tractable, principled lens to dissect and predict emergent reasoning behaviors in large language models without examining millions of parameters.
items.summary_zh: 本研究针对Transformer语言模型中归纳推理能力的涌现机制，将多种合成任务统一为一类广义归纳任务，并证明其训练动态可被限定在一个低维不变流形上，只由少数可解释坐标描述。该框架揭示了数据统计如何支配上下文学习与权重内学习的竞争，以及随机初始化如何决定最终胜出的推理回路，为理解归纳推理的学习原理提供了高度可分析的理论工具。
items.title_en: Invariant Learning Dynamics of Transformers in Inductive Reasoning Tasks

items.title: A Durability and Cross-Language Transfer Benchmark for a Validated Teaching-Feedback Classification Protocol
items.summary_en: This study investigates whether a validated protocol for classifying open-ended teaching feedback by theme and sentiment remains effective as representation techniques evolve and across languages. By comparing sparse lexical features, frozen transformer embeddings, and prompted large language models on Spanish data, and transferring the sentiment task to a large English corpus, the authors find the protocol durable, with a 2026 frontier model achieving strong performance. This demonstrates that carefully designed annotation frameworks can leverage modern AI advances and scale across languages, enabling institutions to efficiently analyze vast volumes of feedback they currently leave unread.
items.summary_zh: Institutions collect far more open-ended teaching-evaluation feedback than they read. A prior study introduced a validated protocol for classifying such comments by thematic category and sentiment, built from a documented annotation guide, an intra-annotator reliability measurement, stratified cross
items.title_en: A Durability and Cross-Language Transfer Benchmark for a Validated Teaching-Feedback Classification Protocol

items.title: Inside the Unfair Judge: A Mechanistic Interpretability Account of LLM-as-Judge Bias
items.summary_en: This paper tackles scoring bias in LLM-as-judge settings by offering a representation-level account rather than relying solely on input-output perturbations. Across many judges and bias types, it shows that biased judgments correspond to activations shifted along a consistent low-dimensional subspace, and that steering hidden states along that subspace can causally induce or reverse bias. This mechanistic interpretability approach not only deepens understanding but also enables operational control beyond prompt-level fixes.
items.summary_zh: 该工作从机制可解释性角度研究大语言模型（LLM）作为评分裁判时的偏见问题，发现偏见在隐状态
items.title_en: Inside the Unfair Judge: A Mechanistic Interpretability Account of LLM-as-Judge Bias

items.title: Evidence-Backed Video Question Answering
items.summary_en: Current Video LLMs provide answers without verifiable visual grounding, so this work proposes Evidence-Backed Video Question Answering (E-VQA), a task that demands both semantic answers and dense spatio-temporal evidence (temporal segments and tracked object
items.summary_zh: 该研究针对现有视频大模型缺乏可验证视觉依据的“黑箱”问题，提出证据支撑的视频问答（E-VQA）任务，要求模型同时输出答案与精确的时空分割掩码证据。他们构建了首个像素级时空基准ST-Evidence，揭示当前模型存在答案准确性与真实视觉感知脱节的关键缺陷，并通过大规模自动生成流程创建了ST-Evidence-Instruct数据集来推动更可信的视频理解。

items.title: Jul 13, 2026Societal ImpactsClaude’s values across models and languages
items.summary_en: This research investigates how Claude's ethical values vary across different model sizes and languages, revealing inconsistent alignment that could lead to disparate societal impacts. By testing value expressions in multiple languages, the study uncovers performance gaps that underscore the need for robust, language-agnostic safety measures. These findings are critical for building globally equitable AI systems that maintain consistent values regardless of language or deployment context.
items.summary_zh: 该研究探讨了Claude在不同模型和语言版本中价值观的表达与一致性，及其对社会的影响。核心发现指出，尽管跨模型和跨语言保持价值对齐面临挑战，但确保核心价值观的稳定对于多语言AI系统的公平性和可信度至关重要。这为评估和缓解全球化部署中的伦理风险提供了重要参考。
items.title_en: Jul 13, 2026Societal ImpactsClaude’s values across models and languages

items.title: Working at the frontier: How Hebbia builds AI for financial diligence that can't miss a detail
items.summary_en: Hebbia addresses the critical problem of error-prone manual review in high-stakes financial diligence, where overlooking a single clause can have major consequences. The company builds specialized AI systems—likely leveraging large language models and advanced retrieval techniques—that systematically parse complex financial documents to ensure no detail is missed. This matters because it enables analysts to work at the frontier of speed and accuracy, transforming diligence from a brittle human process into a reliable, AI-augmented capability.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍 Hebbia 公司如何打造专为金融尽职调查设计的 AI，核心目标是确保在审查海量文件时不会遗漏任何关键细节。他们采用前沿技术，如复杂检索与深度分析，直接应对金融交易中因信息疏漏可能导致的重大风险，对提升投资决策的严谨性至关重要。
items.title_en: Working at the frontier: How Hebbia builds AI for financial diligence that can't miss a detail

items.title: Demis Hassabis：AGI 数年可至，影响达工业革命10倍
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind 联合创始人 Demis Hassabis 发文称，AGI 可能仅需数年即可实现，其影响将达工业革命的10倍且速度更快。他指出，前沿模型在网络安全、核与生物风险方面已构成挑战，未来需对日益智能体化、递归自我改进的系统建立稳健防护。Hassabis 呼吁美国率先建立类似 FINRA 的前沿AI标准机构，采用联邦监督下的公私合作或自律组织模式，由独立技术专家和开源代表组成董事会，资金主要来自行业以吸引顶尖人才和算力。他强调，当前商业与地缘竞赛导致技术进步快于理解，需以谨慎乐观态度推进公共政策，兼顾创新与安全。
items.summary_zh: Demis Hassabis 指出通用人工智能（AGI）可能在数年内实现，其影响将是工业革命的十倍且速度更快，但当前的前沿模型已在网络安全、核与生物领域构成安全挑战。他提出核心解决思路是呼吁美国建立类似 FINRA 的前沿 AI 标准机构，采用行业资助、独立专家与开源代表共同治理的公私合作模式，为日益自主和递归自我改进的系统建立稳健防护。此举旨在应对技术演进快于理解的竞赛现状，以谨慎乐观的态度在创新与安全间取得平衡。
items.title_zh: Demis Hassabis：AGI 数年可至，影响达工业革命10倍

items.title: 实测LibTV Agent：100个AI视频工作流重组为Skill，实现创意自由
items.summary_en: LibTV Agent tackles the complexity of end-to-end video production by providing a library of 100+ pre-built AI video skills that automatically translate a user’s idea into a structured storyboard and node-based workflow, complete with self-checking and repair. Its no-code skill creation and ability to output coherent, multilingual videos with editable timelines democratize high-quality video generation, significantly lowering the barrier for creators and speeding up iteration.
items.summary_zh: LibTV Agent通过内置的Skill Hub将100多个视频工作流封装为可复用的模板，解决了非专业用户从创意到分镜、生成、自查返修的全流程自动化难题。其核心创新在于Agent能理解用户意图、自动构建可编辑的节点工作流，并支持零代码创建个性化Skill，大幅降低了专业视频创作的门槛。这意味着创意者只需输入想法即可获得连贯成片并精细调整，真正实现了视频生成的灵活性与控制力。
items.title_zh: 实测LibTV Agent：100个AI视频工作流重组为Skill，实现创意自由

items.title: 腾讯混元 Hy3 量化版发布：1bit 版本单卡可部署，4bit 版本接近满血性能
items.summary_en: The quantization of Tencent's 295B-parameter Hy3 model addresses the prohibitive memory requirements of deploying massive language models by compressing weights to 1-bit (85.5 GiB) and 4-bit (169.9 GiB), achieving near-original performance on tasks like agent interaction, multilingual code, and long-context understanding. This matters because the open-source GGUF-formatted releases, combined with speculative decoding speedups of 50–60%, enable efficient single- or dual-GPU inference, significantly lowering the barrier for real-world adoption.
items.summary_zh: 腾讯混元推出Hy3模型的1bit量化版，通过将295B参数的权重压缩至85.5 GiB，实现单卡推理部署，解决了超大模型对高端多卡资源的依赖；4bit版则在两张显卡上以接近原模型的性能运行，支持多种复杂任务，并结合投机解码大幅提速，显著降低了落地门槛。
items.title_zh: 腾讯混元 Hy3 量化版发布：1bit 版本单卡可部署，4bit 版本接近满血性能

items.title: 高德发布通用世界模型工坊 ABot-WorldStudio，已开放测试
items.summary_en: Alibaba’s Amap introduces ABot-WorldStudio, a unified framework that combines interactive video generation with 3D Gaussian Splatting scene generation, allowing users to create real
items.summary_zh: 高德ABot-WorldStudio解决了从文字或图片快速构建可交互3D世界的难题，通过将交互式视频生成与3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）场景生成相统一，实现实时创作与分享。其底层模型可单卡本地部署并已开源，实测稳定运行超1小时，推动沉浸式AI内容创作门槛大幅降低。
items.title_zh: 高德发布通用世界模型工坊 ABot-WorldStudio，已开放测试

items.title: 普林斯顿教授 Narayanan 在 ICML 2026 发表主旨演讲：AI 作为正常技术，人类应主动适应而非躺平
items.summary_en: Princeton professor Arvind Narayanan argues in his ICML 2026 keynote that AI should be treated as a normal technology, not an existential disruptor that will suddenly replace everyone, and that recursive self‑improvement in labs won’t cause mass unemployment overnight. He urges the AI community to reject passive acceptance of job displacement and instead proactively build complementary human skills like judgment and taste, envisioning a future of “co‑superintelligence” where humans and AI adapt together. This reframing matters because it shifts the conversation from fear to agency, empowering researchers and society to shape work and value in a fundamentally changing landscape.
items.summary_zh: 普林斯顿大学教授 Arvind Narayanan 在 ICML 2026 演讲中，针对 AI 可能引发大规模失业的恐慌，提出应将 AI 视为“正常技术”而非颠覆性威胁，强调实验室里程碑不会突然导致全面取代。其核心主张是，人类不应被动接受工作被取代，而应主动发展判断力、品味等与 AI 互补的技能，迈向“共超智能”协作未来。该观点为技术社会如何理性应对 AI 变革提供了重要行动框架。
items.title_zh: 普林斯顿教授 Narayanan 在 ICML 2026 发表主旨演讲：AI 作为正常技术，人类应主动适应而非躺平

items.title: 马斯克承认 Grok Build 上传用户代码，SpaceXAI 承诺彻底删除数据
items.summary_en: Independent security researchers demonstrated that SpaceXAI's coding agent Grok Build uploaded entire code repositories—including a 12GB test repo and a user's home directory—to Google Cloud even after users disabled the model improvement setting. Elon Musk acknowledged the unintended data collection and pledged to permanently delete all previously uploaded user data, while introducing a `/privacy` command for opt-out and deletion. This incident highlights critical privacy flaws in AI‑powered development tools and the need for transparent, verifiable data handling practices.
items.summary_zh: 马斯克承认旗下 AI 编程代理 Grok Build 在用户关闭“帮助改进模型”后仍擅自上传整个代码仓库至 Google Cloud，独立安全研究者通过钓鱼仓库和日志分析证实了该行为，包括一次上传整个主目录的严重事件。这一问题暴露了 AI 开发工具在隐私承诺与实际数据处理之间的严重脱节，促使 SpaceXAI 承诺彻底删除已上传数据并推出追溯性隐私控制命令，凸显了在自动化编程代理中建立透明、可验证的数据治理机制的紧迫性。
items.title_zh: 马斯克承认 Grok Build 上传用户代码，SpaceXAI 承诺彻底删除数据

items.title: 面壁智能CTO曾国洋专访：端侧模型是AI落地关键路径
items.summary_en: Mianbao Intelligence tackles the challenge of deploying AI efficiently on edge devices by advancing on‑device models and a “model wind tunnel” methodology that predicts training outcomes from small‑scale tests. Their key findings include the “Mianbao Law”
items.summary_zh: 面壁智能CTO提出端侧模型是AI落地的关键路径，通过“模型风洞”方法论和“面壁定律”（知识密度每3.5个月翻番），其2B参数的MiniCPM在性能上超越同期8B竞品；并完成高通、华为昇腾等多芯片适配，BitCPM模型可在昇腾上提升约6倍内存效率，结合全双工多模态交互与AI自研训练框架，大幅降低了端侧部署门槛，推动高效、实时的AI应用落地。
items.title_zh: 面壁智能CTO曾国洋专访：端侧模型是AI落地关键路径

items.title: 商汤开源 SenseNova-Vision-7B-MoT 多任务视觉模型
items.summary_en: SenseNova-Vision-7B-MoT tackles the fragmentation of specialized vision models by unifying diverse tasks—detection, OCR, segmentation, depth estimation, and more—into a single model. Its key innovation is enabling natural language to define new visual task variants, seamlessly recombining capabilities across traditional boundaries. This open-source release, including model weights and a 50M-example corpus, democratizes flexible, multi-task vision research and simplifies real-world deployment.
items.summary_zh: 商汤开源 SenseNova-Vision-7B-MoT 模型，旨在解决传统视觉模型需独立处理检测、OCR、分割等多类任务而难以跨任务泛化的问题。其关键在于通过自然语言定义新的视觉任务变体，打破任务边界并重组视觉能力，实现多任务统一。这一开源发布（含模型与海量示例数据集）将显著降低多模态视觉系统的开发门槛，推动视觉智能从单任务走向通用化。
items.title_zh: 商汤开源 SenseNova-Vision-7B-MoT 多任务视觉模型

items.title: 视频生成创企 PixVerse 完成 4.39 亿美元 C 轮扩展融资，估值超 20 亿美元
items.summary_en: PixVerse addresses the challenge of scalable,
items.summary_zh: PixVerse 通过巨额融资解决了视频生成模型研发与规模化商业落地的资金瓶颈，其面向消费者、影视专业和游戏开发的多系列模型能生成高清带音频视频，已积累超 1.5 亿用户。这既验证了 AI 视频生成的市场需求，也将推动其在企业和全球市场的快速渗透，重塑内容生产范式。
items.title_zh: 视频生成创企 PixVerse 完成 4.39 亿美元 C 轮扩展融资，估值超 20 亿美元

items.title: 前沿模型实际成本：tokenizer 差异导致隐性涨价
items.summary_en: 同一份 TypeScript 文件在 GPT-5.x 上为 681 个 token，在 Claude 最新 tokenizer 下为 1，178 个，相差 1.73 倍。Anthropic 新 tokenizer 比旧版多产生约 30% 的 token，标价不变，构成隐性涨价。Claude Opus 4.6 与 Opus 4.8 标价同为 $5.00 / $25.00，但新 tokenizer 使同一代码的 token 数增加约 32%。Claude Sonnet 5 的 $2.00 / $10.00 为促销价，2026 年 8 月 31 日后恢复 $3.00 / $15.00，届时相同代码成
items.summary_zh: 这篇分析揭示了tokenizer差异导致的前沿模型隐性涨价问题：同一代码在Claude新tokenizer下比旧版多产生约30% token，且在TypeScript等代码上比GPT多出1.5至1.73倍，标价不变却使用户实际成本大幅上升。该发现警示用户评估成本时必须考虑tokenizer效率，而非仅看名义价格，尤其Claude Sonnet 5促销价到期后成本将比前代高出约32%，影响重大。
items.title_zh: 前沿模型实际成本：tokenizer 差异导致隐性涨价

items.title: OpenAI 面向普通用户发布提示词指南：从结果出发，少写步骤
items.summary_en: OpenAI’s plain-language prompt guide addresses the challenge of helping everyday users get better results from AI by structuring prompts around four optional modules: goal, context, output format, and boundaries, with a key recommendation to start with the desired outcome and use a few hard rules instead of detailed step-by-step scripts. The guide highlights two modes—Chat for quick tasks and ChatGPT Work (based on Codex and GPT-5.6) for complex, multi-source projects—and introduces new Codex features like Steer, Queue, and slash commands for iterative control. This matters because it lowers the barrier to effective AI interaction, encouraging users to refine prompts through natural follow-up rather than requiring perfect initial instructions.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 发布提示词指南，主推以目标结果为导向、减少指令步骤的写法，用硬性规则替代逐步脚本，帮助普通用户更高效地使用大模型。指南区分了处理快速任务的 Chat 与承担多源多步复杂工作的 ChatGPT Work，并借助 Codex 的 Steer、Queue 及斜杠命令等功能，让模型支持任务干预与规划，表明提示词不再需要一次写对，通过后续追问即可调整。这降低了用户的使用门槛，并推动大模型从问答工具向可管理复杂项目的工作引擎转变。
items.title_zh: OpenAI 面向普通用户发布提示词指南：从结果出发，少写步骤

items.title: 德国AI协会发布开源模型Soofi S，在英语和德语基准测试中领先
items.summary_en: The open-source Soofi S model tackles the demand for a sovereign, high-performance bilingual LLM in English and German by combining Mamba-2 and attention layers in a mixture-of-experts architecture that activates only 3.2B of its 30B parameters per token. It achieves the top composite scores among fully open models on both English and German benchmarks and delivers roughly 8× the generation throughput of comparable dense models, supporting up to 1M‑token contexts. This matters because it provides a genuinely open, EU‑cloud‑trained alternative that advances efficiency and state‑of‑the‑art German‑language AI under transparent, sovereign principles.
items.summary_zh: 德国AI联盟推出的开源模型Soofi S采用Mamba-2与注意力混合的MoE架构，以316亿总参数量仅激活32亿参数，在英德双语基准上全面领先同类开源模型，解决了高效多语言大模型的性能瓶颈。该模型完全在德国电信云上训练并提升德语数据占比，实现了4万token上下文中达稠密模型8倍的生成吞吐量，对推动欧洲语言开源模型的高效推理具有重要意义。
items.title_zh: 德国AI协会发布开源模型Soofi S，在英语和德语基准测试中领先

items.title: 腾讯混元发布 HyOCR-1.5：端到端 OCR 大模型全栈开源，推理提速 6.37 倍
items.summary_en: Tencent's HyOCR-1.5 is the first fully open-source end-to-end OCR expert model, addressing the need for accurate, efficient, and accessible document understanding. With only 1B parameters, it integrates DFlash speculative decoding for up to 6.37× inference speedup and uses Agentic Data Flow to extend capabilities to 331 languages, ancient text, and multi-image reasoning. It achieves state-of-the-art 94.74 on OmniDocBench, making powerful, real-time, multilingual OCR publicly available for research and applications.
items.summary_zh: 腾讯混元发布了 HyOCR-1.5，这是首个将训练、推理和模型权重全栈开源的端到端 OCR 专家模型，仅 1B 参数便覆盖 8 种以上文本中心任务。通过引入 DFlash 投机解码框架，在 Transformers 下实现 6.37 倍推理加速，并借助 Agentic Data Flow 将能力拓展至 331 种语言、古文字识别与多图问答，最终在 OmniDocBench v1.6 上以 94.74 分取得端到端最优成绩，为低资源场景提供了高效且全面的开源基准。
items.title_zh: 腾讯混元发布 HyOCR-1.5：端到端 OCR 大模型全栈开源，推理提速 6.37 倍

items.title: QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.19.10
items.summary_en: The Qwen Code v0.19.10 release tackles the difficulty of working across multiple coding projects simultaneously by broadening multi-workspace support to the ACP transport, daemon workers, split-view sessions, and workspace-aware actions. It also upgrades the Web Shell with an artifact panel and a modernized sidebar, enabling smoother artifact management. These changes matter because they streamline complex multi-project workflows, making it easier for developers to switch contexts and collaborate efficiently.
items.summary_zh: 该版本通过跨ACP传输、守护进程、分屏会话等多模块协同实现了全域多工作区支持，直接解决了开发者在复杂项目中频繁切换工作区的痛点。同步增强的Web Shell集成了工件面板与现代化侧边栏，提升了交互效率。这些改进使得协作式编码与上下文管理更贴近真实工作流，显著降低了任务切换成本。

items.title: QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.19.9-nightly.20260714.9dd8389eb
items.summary_en: This nightly release improves Qwen Code’s reliability in automated (YOLO) mode by preventing an unwanted exit when the model calls `enter_plan_mode`, and it enhances CLI workflows by forwarding user-question answers from SDK’s `can_use_tool`. It also localizes approval-mode UI labels, making the interface accessible to a wider audience—together these changes ensure more seamless, uninterrupted automation.
items.summary_zh: 该 nightly 版本修复了 YOLO 模式在模型调用规划模式时意外退出的问题，新增加了通过 SDK 转发用户交互回答以支持工具调用的功能，并本地化了审批模式的界面标签。这些

items.title: QwenLM/qwen-code: SDK TypeScript Release v0.1.8
items.summary_en: The QwenLM/qwen-code SDK v0.1.8 for TypeScript packages a specific version of the Qwen Code CLI to provide an all-in-one solution for code
items.summary_zh: 此版本解决了之前因工作流失败导致 v0.1.5 的 GitHub 发布缺失的问题，通过回填发布记录并明确捆绑的 CLI 稳定版本（0.19.10、0.15.3、0.13.1），确保 SDK 包的分发完整性和版本一致性，对依赖该包的用户至关重要。

items.title: MoonshotAI/kimi-code: @moonshot-ai/kimi-code@0.24.1
items.summary_en: This update improves the developer experience when using kimi-code by retaining goal completion summaries and cleaning up error output during step interruptions. It specifically removes internal error-code prefixes from untyped LLM errors, making logs more readable for debugging. These changes help AI/ML researchers more easily interpret agent behavior and diagnose failures in their workflows.
items.summary_zh: 此次更新优化了任务中断时的信息展示，保留目标完成摘要，并在步骤中断事件中直接呈现未类型化的LLM错误，去除了内部错误码前缀。这些改进使开发者能更清晰、直观地诊断中断原因，提升调试效率。

items.title: MoonshotAI/kimi-code: @moonshot-ai/kimi-code@0.24.0
items.summary_en: This release introduces v2 session export support, which enables users to package diagnostic data into
items.summary_zh: 此更新为诊断功能提供了v2会话导出支持，便于将问题排查数据打包为zip档案，从而提升开发环境的问题定位效率。
